# Required status checks for branch protection on `main` — the single source of truth.
#
# These names are copied VERBATIM from a real PR run (`gh pr checks <pr> --json name`), not
# typed by hand: a one-character mismatch with the actual GitHub check name deadlocks every
# merge (the required context never reports). Phase 4 reads this file, sets these as the
# required contexts, then reads the protection back and asserts it equals these lines.
#
# Parsing rule (for the setup tooling): ignore blank lines and lines starting with `#`; each
# remaining line is one required check name, used exactly as written.
#
# Why this subset (decision D3): `lint` + the Ubuntu 3.12 leg + the Windows 3.12 leg (the
# Windows-only regression guard) + the Flask admin suite. The extra Ubuntu legs (3.10, 3.11)
# run on every PR but are not required; `smoke` runs only post-merge and is never required.
lint
test (ubuntu-latest, 3.12)
test (windows-latest, 3.12)
ui-web
